intent: Several agents argue distinct assigned perspectives over a decision; after bounded rounds of critique, a moderator synthesizes one recommendation with the disagreements preserved.

state.question: string — the decision to make, with its constraints
state.perspectives: array of { id, stance_brief, position, critiques_received }

nodes.role_ref: instantiated per perspective; profiles vary by stance_brief

edges.when: each debater states an initial position
round < budget.max_iterations: each debater critiques the others' positions and revises

termination: fixed rounds (default 2) or early convergence; the moderator must publish surviving disagreements, never vote them away
